headline: Is Salesforce (CRM) Now Offering Value After A 26% One Year Share Price Fall?
summary: If you are wondering whether Salesforce at around US$187 represents value or risk at this point, this article will help you view the stock through a clear valuation lens. The share price is at US$187.18, with a 0.8% move over the last week, a 4.5% decline over the last month, and a 26.2% decline both year to date and over the past year. This raises questions about how the market is currently pricing the business. These returns have put Salesforce back on many investors' radars, particularly...

headline: Big Tech H-1B Filings Plunge As Amazon, Google, Meta And Microsoft Slash Jobs Amid Rising Immigration Costs
summary: H-1B visa applications at major tech companies fell sharply in late 2025 as layoffs rose and stricter U.S. immigration rules increased costs and scrutiny. Big Tech H-1B Applications Drop Federal data shows Amazon.com Inc.), Alphabet Inc.'s Google, Meta Platforms, Inc., and Microsoft Corp filed significantly fewer H-1B petitions in the first quarter of fiscal 2026, as reported by Business Insider on Wednesday.
